seasonality: Revenue is event-driven, spiking during NFT/gaming campaign launches (e.g., Avalanche Rush incentive periods) and broader bull-market DeFi inflows, with no strong calendar seasonality.
rationale: DefiLlama reports AVAX TVL near $873M as of late May 2025, down from ~$1.4B in early 2024, reflecting a decelerating trend. Annualized protocol fees (gas + subnet fees captured on-chain) are estimated at ~$27.8M based on DefiLlama's trailing 30-day fee data (~$2.3M/month × 12); at a ~$790M fully-diluted-adjusted market cap of circulating supply (~$7.9B total market cap with ~$788M revenue-bearing network), the P/S of ~28x is elevated versus BNB but in line with SOL. Real yield to stakers is effectively null because staking rewards are entirely inflationary (~8.2% APR) with no fee-burn mechanism redirecting revenue to stakers the way ETH post-merge does.
